task_tokens_consumed: Is a per-token curve-curvature-gated attention mechanism anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Methods that gate attention based on local curvature in attention or hidden-state geometry.
Methods that adapt attention bandwidth or context length per token based on importance signals.
Analysis of hidden-state trajectories in transformer/LLM models via geometric tools (manifolds, paths).
Riemannian / Fisher-Rao / differential-geometric formulations of attention.
Methods varying attention bandwidth by position (ALiBi, Sliding-window with adaptive size).

landscape_completeness_claim: Five clusters cover gating+curvature, token-importance, trajectory analysis, differential geometry, position-encoded bandwidth. Frenet-Serret specific framing falls under C3+C4 intersection.
